package snap.visibility

import me.tbsten.cream.*

/**
 * (Auto generate by @[SealedCopy] annotation of [State])
 * 
 * Type-preserving State.copy generated by @SealedCopy.
 * 
 * Updates shared abstract properties and dispatches to each subtype's copy.
 * 
 * # Example: Basic
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: State = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: State = state.copy()
 * ```
 * 
 * # Example: Override property values
 * 
 * ```kt
 * val state: State = /* one of the subtypes */
 * val updated: State = state.copy(property = value)
 * ```
 * 
 * 
 * @see State
 * @see State.Loaded
 * @see State.Loading
 */
internal fun snap.visibility.State.copy(
    id: String = this.id,
): snap.visibility.State = when (this) {
    is snap.visibility.State.Loaded -> this.copy(id = id)
    is snap.visibility.State.Loading -> this.copy(id = id)
}

## Input

package snap.visibility

import me.tbsten.cream.SealedCopy
import me.tbsten.cream.CopyVisibility

@SealedCopy(visibility = CopyVisibility.INTERNAL)
sealed interface State {
    val id: String

    data class Loading(override val id: String) : State
    data class Loaded(override val id: String, val payload: Int) : State
}
